allow: Bash(cmd.exe /c 'powershell -Command "$zip = [System.IO.Compression.ZipFile]::OpenRead\('\\''C:\\Users\\juanp\\Downloads\\Developing and deploying Spring Boot microservices on Kubernetes.docx'\\''\); $entry = $zip.Entries | Where-Object { $_.FullName -eq '\\''word/document.xml'\\'' }; $stream = $entry.Open\(\); $reader = New-Object System.IO.StreamReader\($stream\); $content = $reader.ReadToEnd\(\); $zip.Dispose\(\); $text = $content -replace '\\''<[^>]+>'\\'', '\\'' '\\'' -replace '\\''\\s+'\\'', '\\'' '\\''; $text.Substring\(0, [Math]::Min\(20000, $text.Length\)\)"')
